{{CargoRelic
|name=Kurgan Stelae
|class_id=22480
|rank=Blue
|affct=CIV
|birthday=02-06
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.03%)
|description=On Feb 6, 1213 AD, a huge stone statue is planted in the ground.<br>Kurgans are one of the main constituents of the Central Asian ethnic groups and are now spread across more than a dozen countries and regions worldwide. According to historical records, the Kurgens have unique burial ceremonies and customs. When a person dies, their body is placed in a felt tent. Their descendants and relatives slaughter horses and sheep and place them in front of the tent for sacrifice. They lead horses around the tent seven times, then enter the tent, cut their faces, and shed tears mixed with blood. They do this seven times before burning the deceased's belongings and burying them. Finally, a stone pillar is erected at the tomb, depicting the deceased's image and life. Today, these have become a unique landscape of the northern grasslands.
|fame=34
|art=30
|fth=25
|civ=46
|tech=19
|ss1=Mutant Minion RUSH +1%
|ss2=Mutant Minion RUSH +2%
|ss3=Mutant Minion RUSH +3%
|ss4=Mutant Minion RUSH +5%
|ss7=Mutant Minion RUSH +5%<br>Mutant Minion RUSH +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Wishingegg skill I.png|50px]]Place in Wishing Egg: Green rewards from this egg turn Blue by 1%
}}
